name: Oyster-Artichoke Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Artichoke hearts, drained, cut into bite-sized
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and sauté green onions and garlic until soft.
2. Add artichokes, sprinkled with flour, and stir to coat well. Do not brown.
3. Add chicken stock; let it simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Drain oysters, reserving the liquid, and check for shell bits and sand. Add oysters and their liquid to the soup.
5. Season to taste using cayenne pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and salt. Simmer for another 10-15 minutes.
6. Can be chilled and kept overnight (in fact, the flavors improve) and then heated before serving.
